cases.description: Verify app launch, animation, and transition
steps: 1. Tap the application icon to launch the app.
2. Verify the splash screen is displayed immediately.
4. Wait for the splash screen process to complete.
cases.expected: App launches immediately; splash screen animation plays; transitions automatically to ON_01B_Onboarding Step.

verifications.description: Verify app launch, animation, and transition
verifications.expected: App launches immediately; splash screen animation plays; transitions automatically to ON_01B_Onboarding Step.
verifications.verification: Verify visible: Welcome to the new Sprocket!
